salvage.note.title: Note:
salvage.note.common: Prices are obtained in real-time from the GW2 API. The "Processed Price" includes Trading Post fees (15% discount on sell price). The cost of Unidentified Gear uses the current buy price from the Trading Post. Drop rates are based on official data from the GW2 Wiki for Piece of Common Unidentified Gear opened and then salvaged with Copper-Fed Salvage-o-Matic. Recommendation: Have an inventory of 280 slots to facilitate the process.
salvage.note.masterwork: Prices are obtained in real-time from the GW2 API. The "Processed Price" includes Trading Post fees (15% discount on sell price). The cost of Unidentified Gear uses the current buy price from the Trading Post. Drop rates are based on official data from the GW2 Wiki for Piece of Unidentified Gear (Masterwork) opened and then salvaged with Runecrafter's Salvage-o-Matic. Recommendation: Have an inventory of 280 slots to facilitate the process.
salvage.note.rare: Prices are obtained in real-time from the GW2 API. The "Processed Price" includes Trading Post fees (15% discount on sell price). The cost of Unidentified Gear uses the current buy price from the Trading Post. Drop rates are based on official data from the GW2 Wiki for Piece of Rare Unidentified Gear opened and then salvaged with Silver-Fed Salvage-o-Matic. Recommendation: Have an inventory of 280 slots to facilitate the process.

fourWinds.overview.p1: The Four Winds Festival is an annual event that celebrates the cultural diversity of Tyria. With activities like Queen's Gauntlet and Boss Blitz, it offers unique opportunities to obtain valuable rewards and exclusive materials.
fourWinds.cards.gauntlet.title: Queen's Gauntlet
fourWinds.cards.gauntlet.desc: A series of combat challenges that reward unique tokens and valuable materials.
fourWinds.cards.blitz.title: Boss Blitz
fourWinds.cards.blitz.desc: Cooperative event where teams compete to defeat bosses quickly.
fourWinds.cards.tokens.title: Festival Tokens
fourWinds.cards.tokens.desc: Main festival currency. Exchange for unique Tome of Knowledge
fourWinds.calculator.title: Box Calculator
fourWinds.prices.title: Prices and Data

fourWinds.strategies.gauntlet.title: Queen's Gauntlet
fourWinds.strategies.gauntlet.progressiv: Start with the easiest challenges and progress gradually.
fourWinds.strategies.gauntlet.buildsDesc: Use specific builds for each type of challenge.
fourWinds.strategies.gauntlet.rewardsDes: Harder challenges offer exclusive tokens and materials.
fourWinds.strategies.blitz.title: Boss Blitz
fourWinds.strategies.blitz.coordinationD: Form coordinated groups to maximize defeat speed.
fourWinds.strategies.blitz.routesDesc: Plan routes that minimize travel time between bosses.
fourWinds.strategies.blitz.timingDesc: The best times are during server peak hours.
fourWinds.tips.title: Farming Tips
fourWinds.tips.gauntlet: Prioritize Queen's Gauntlet for unique rewards
fourWinds.tips.groups: Form groups for faster Boss Blitz
fourWinds.tips.tokens: Accumulate Festival Tokens for bulk exchanges
fourWinds.tips.events: Participate in special events during the festival

halloween.overview.p1: The Halloween Festival in Guild Wars 2 is one of the best farming opportunities. With activities like the Mad King's Labyrinth and Trick-or-Treat Bags, you can generate significant amounts of gold in a short time.
halloween.cards.bags.title: Trick-or-Treat Bags
halloween.cards.bags.desc: The bags contain random items with different drop rates. Price analysis helps you determine if it's profitable to open them.
halloween.cards.lab.title: Mad King's Labyrinth
halloween.cards.lab.desc: The labyrinth is the main activity. With a good route and group, you can obtain hundreds of bags per hour.
halloween.cards.corn.title: Candy Corn
halloween.cards.corn.desc: The main festival material. Its prices fluctuate during and after the event, creating trading opportunities.
halloween.calculator.title: Custom Halloween Calculator
halloween.calculator.emptyTip: Use the buttons above to add items
halloween.strategies.title: Farming Strategies
halloween.strategies.lab.title: Mad King's Labyrinth
halloween.strategies.lab.routeDesc: Follow a specific route to maximize bags per hour.
halloween.strategies.lab.groupDesc: A group of 5 people can obtain 200+ bags per hour.
halloween.strategies.lab.timingDesc: The best times are during server peak hours.
halloween.strategies.tp.title: Trading Post
halloween.strategies.tp.earlyDesc: Buy bags before the festival when prices are low.
halloween.strategies.tp.sellDesc: Sell specific items when their prices reach peaks.
halloween.strategies.tp.cornDesc: Take advantage of Candy Corn price fluctuations.
